title: calamagrostis canescens f. convoluta
intro: Calamagrostis canescens f. convoluta, also known as convoluted blue oat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis canescens f. convoluta include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Calamagrostis canescens f. convoluta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
